commands.name: git

all_of.name: git_args
all_of.description: Git command arguments passed after the command name.

commands.description: Run git in the repository root through the command-runner entry point.

commands.name: git-main-sync
commands.description: Synchronize the local main branch with origin/main through a deterministic checkout, fetch, optional merge-base reset, ff-only pull sequence, and cleanup of local branches whose PRs are merged.
